message:
docs(ad): simplify Cholesky VJP step 3 comments to match corrected implementation

Update comments in cholesky_vjp to use Φ notation consistently and
describe the two-phase triangular solve (L^T X = Φ, then X L^{-1})
more concisely now that the diagonal factor and back-substitution
direction are correct.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
